skill_text:
A Voice Activity Detection model by Eklavya, using the Hugging Face framework. Framework: Hugging Face. Functionality: Voice Activity Detection. API call: pipeline('voice-activity-detection', model='Eklavya/ZFF_VAD'). This tool has no required input fields.
When to use:
- Use `hugging_face__eklavya_zff_vad__pipeline_voice_activity_detection_model_a74baab9` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- This tool has no required input fields.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
- Do not use when required inputs are missing.
